params.name: Yongle Encyclopedia
params.description:
On Jul 21, 1407 AD, after five years of compilation, the Yongle Encyclopedia was finally completed.
The Yongle Encyclopedia is a monumental work compiled by Emperor Yongle of the Ming Dynasty, edited by scholars Xie Jin and Yao Guangxiao. Its content covers a wide range of subjects, including astronomy, geography, medicine, agriculture, and more. It collected the knowledge and wisdom inherited from thousands of years of Chinese civilization, with content from seven to eight thousand books. Un …
